description: Use this API to build an electrical equivalent of radial and, optionally, two-point Type 1 buses in a specified subsystem of the working case (activity EQRD). This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = eqrd(sid, all, status)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: An array of eight elements specifying They are used to control equivalencing options. A value of 0 means the option is not enabled. A value of 1 means the option is enabled. (input).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

status.description: build an electrical equivalent of radial buses only (0 by default).
suppress the equivalencing option for transformers (0 by default).
suppress the equivalencing option for zero impedance lines (0 by default).
suppress the equivalencing option for controlled buses (0 by default).
suppress the equivalencing option for mutually coupled branches (0 by default).
suppress the equivalencing option for area boundary buses (0 by default).
suppress the equivalencing option for zone boundary buses (0 by default).
apply transformer impedance correction to zero sequence network (1 by default).

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
error writing the working case to a temporary file.
load table is full; restoring original working case.
fixed bus shunt table is full; restoring original working case.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
